description: Create a B/V color ratio map of Messier 12 using AstroImageJ using the B-band (Bcomb.fits) and V-band (Vcomb.fits) images located in ~/AstroImages/color_map/. Generate a 32-bit float ratio map by dividing the B-band image by the V-band image and save it to ~/AstroImages/color_map/output/BV_ratio_map.fits. Using the approximate coordinates provided in target_stars.txt, measure the B/V ratio at the brightest pixel for Star_A, Star_B, and Star_C. Create a report at ~/AstroImages/color_map/output/color_results.txt containing the measured ratios for each star and identifying which is the 'Bluest' (highest ratio) and which is the 'Reddest' (lowest ratio).
